questions.question: Какое property LSM-tree enables incremental checkpointing?

options.text: SST files immutable — once written, никогда не modified. Поэтому SST в checkpoint N можно reuse в checkpoint N+1 if still alive. Incremental = upload только NEW SSTs since last checkpoint

questions.explanation: SST immutability — fundamental LSM-tree property — enables incremental checkpointing. Once written, SST никогда не modified (compaction creates NEW SST files, leaves originals untouched until garbage collected). Это значит SST 00010.sst в checkpoint N — тот же файл что в checkpoint N+1 (if not yet compacted away). Flink эксплуатирует это: upload SST только если новый, reference shared SST из previous checkpoints через SharedStateRegistry. Сильно reduces bandwidth (typical 1-5% per checkpoint) и storage (1.05-1.2x state size vs N×state без incremental).

questions.question: Что такое SharedStateRegistry?

options.text: Centralized registry на JobManager — tracks all SST files в active checkpoints с reference counts. Когда checkpoint disposed → decrement refcounts. Когда refcount=0 → delete SST from S3. Это garbage collection mechanism для shared SST

questions.explanation: SharedStateRegistry — JobManager component для tracking SST file usage across multiple incremental checkpoints. Maps SST file identifier → reference count. При checkpoint creation: register new SST (refcount=1) или reuse existing (refcount++). При checkpoint disposal (subsumed by later checkpoint): unregister SST (refcount--). Когда refcount→0 → file deleted from S3. Это elegant garbage collection: ensures SST stays available пока хотя бы один active checkpoint references it. Critical для correctness — без registry SST могли бы быть deleted prematurely → restore broken.

questions.question: Job, 500GB state, incremental checkpoints каждые 60 сек. Storage savings vs full checkpoints?

options.text: ~98% savings. Full: 500GB × num-retained × frequency = huge. Incremental: 500GB × 1.05 ≈ 525GB total (shared SST reuse). Bandwidth: full 500GB/60s = 8.3 GB/s sustained. Incremental: 5-25GB/60s = 0.4 GB/s avg

questions.explanation: Massive savings. Math: Full checkpoints с num-retained=3 = 1.5TB storage steady-state, 500GB upload per checkpoint = 8.3GB/s sustained bandwidth (infeasible на most networks). Incremental: typical 1-5% state changes between checkpoints (новые SST от MemTable flush + compaction). Upload per checkpoint: 5-25GB. Storage: 500GB × 1.05 (через shared SST reuse в SharedStateRegistry) = 525GB. Bandwidth steady-state: 0.4GB/s avg. Cost reduction ~95-98%. Recovery time не improves with incremental (need full SST set от download) — для constant-time recovery нужен ForSt.

questions.question: Incremental checkpoint enables recovery time independent of state size.
questions.explanation: False. Incremental saves UPLOAD bandwidth/storage, не download/recovery time. При recovery от incremental checkpoint Flink download FULL set of SST files (shared + private) — same total bytes as full checkpoint. 1TB state = 1TB download. Recovery time ~ linear с state size. Для recovery time INDEPENDENT of state size нужен ForSt (disaggregated state на S3 — primary storage, recovery = metadata only ~5 секунд для TB state). Incremental — bandwidth optimization, ForSt — recovery optimization. Together они addressing different dimensions same problem.
